name: Scaffold AI
description: Scaffolds AI agent and skill assets (Copilot, Claude) into the workspace at container start.

copilot.description: Scaffold Copilot agents and skills into .github/ (agents/, skills/, prompts/).

claude.description: Scaffold Claude agents and skills into .claude/ (agents/, skills/, commands/).

createFileMCP.description: Copy MCP config template to workspace root for AI models selected. Skipped if already exists.

createFileSetting.description: Copy settings templates to workspace for AI models selected. Skipped if already exist.

updateGitignore.description: Add scaffold-managed paths to .gitignore, wrapped between # [START] Scaffold AI and # [END] Scaffold AI markers. Block is updated on every run.
